name: cryptoscholar
description: Crypto technical analysis inside Claude. Ask about any coin — get live TA, TSS scoring, macro context, and a grounded bull/bear debate. Data from Binance (no API key required for TA tools).
author: cryptographer11

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key — required only for the 'debate' tool. The other 3 tools (analyze_coin, rank_coins, market_context) work without it.

tools.name: analyze_coin
tools.description: Full technical analysis for any coin: EMA-20/50/200, RSI-14, MACD, ADX, ATR, Bollinger Bands, Historical Volatility, and TSS composite score (0–100). Data from Binance (CoinGecko fallback).

tools.name: rank_coins
tools.description: Rank a watchlist of symbols by Trend Strength Score (TSS). Returns a sorted table with full TA data for each coin.

tools.name: market_context
tools.description: Macro market signals: BTC dominance trend, ETH/BTC ratio, TOTAL3 altcoin market cap, stablecoin supply (DefiLlama), ARS (Altcoin Rotation Score 0–100), and MRS (Market Readiness Score 0–100).

tools.name: debate
tools.description: Live bull/bear debate grounded in actual indicator values — not hallucinated opinion. Returns bull case, bear case, and a one-sentence bottom line. Requires ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.
